vectors.name: INT Function
vectors.description: Returns the largest integer less than or equal to a numeric expression.

quirks_and_tests.description: For negative numbers, it mathematically floors downwards (e.g., -2.2 becomes -3).

vectors.name: FIX Function
vectors.description: Returns the truncated integer part of a numeric expression.

quirks_and_tests.description: Unlike INT, it strictly removes the fractional part towards zero without flooring downwards.

vectors.name: CINT Function
vectors.description: Rounds a numeric expression to the nearest integer.

quirks_and_tests.description: CRITICAL QUIRK: QBasic employs 'Banker\'s Rounding'. If the fractional part is exactly .5, it rounds to the nearest EVEN integer.

vectors.name: / (Floating-Point Division)
vectors.description: Divides two numbers and returns a floating-point result.

quirks_and_tests.description: Operands are not rounded before the operation, and the result retains fractional precision.

vectors.name: \ (Integer Division)
vectors.description: Divides two numbers and returns an integer result.

quirks_and_tests.description: CRITICAL QUIRK: Both operands are rounded to integers BEFORE the division occurs. The final result is then truncated to an integer.

vectors.name: MOD Operator
vectors.description: Divides two numbers and returns the integer remainder.

quirks_and_tests.description: Like the backslash operator, MOD rounds its operands to integers BEFORE performing the operation. The result inherits the sign of the first operand.

vectors.name: ABS Function
vectors.description: Returns the absolute value of a numeric expression.

vectors.name: SQR Function
vectors.description: Returns the square root of a numeric expression.

quirks_and_tests.description: Passing a negative number natively throws an 'Illegal function call' exception.

vectors.name: SIN Function
vectors.description: Returns the trigonometric sine of an angle (in radians).

quirks_and_tests.description: To avoid floating-point precision mismatch assertions between MS-DOS x87 architecture and modern V8 IEEE-754, the test result is multiplied by 1000 and clamped to an integer.

vectors.name: COS Function
vectors.description: Returns the trigonometric cosine of an angle (in radians).

quirks_and_tests.description: To avoid floating-point precision mismatch assertions between MS-DOS x87 architecture and modern V8 IEEE-754, the test result is multiplied by 1000 and clamped to an integer.

vectors.name: TAN Function
vectors.description: Returns the trigonometric tangent of an angle (in radians).

quirks_and_tests.description: To avoid floating-point precision mismatch assertions between MS-DOS x87 architecture and modern V8 IEEE-754, the test result is multiplied by 1000 and clamped to an integer.

vectors.name: ATN Function
vectors.description: Returns the arctangent of a numeric expression (in radians).

quirks_and_tests.description: To avoid floating-point precision mismatch assertions between MS-DOS x87 architecture and modern V8 IEEE-754, the test result is multiplied by 1000 and clamped to an integer.

vectors.name: EXP Function
vectors.description: Returns 'e' (the base of natural logarithms) raised to the power of the specified expression.

quirks_and_tests.description: To avoid floating-point precision mismatch assertions between MS-DOS x87 architecture and modern V8 IEEE-754, the test result is multiplied by 1000 and clamped to an integer.

vectors.name: LOG Function
vectors.description: Returns the natural logarithm of a numeric expression.

quirks_and_tests.description: To avoid floating-point precision mismatch assertions between MS-DOS x87 architecture and modern V8 IEEE-754, the test result is multiplied by 1000 and clamped to an integer.
